description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single 'automation' stage where all jobs extend the .common-job-setup template and use the default Docker image. Add a build-post-deploy-migrations-artifact job that runs `bundle exec rake 'post_deploy_migrations:build_post_migrations_artifact'`, produces an artifact at PENDING_POST_DEPLOY_MIGRATIONS expiring in 4 days, and triggers only when $BUILD_POST_MIGRATIONS == "true". Define components:update_gitaly and components:update_kas jobs that each run `bundle exec rake 'components:update_gitaly'` or `bundle exec rake 'components:update_kas'` respectively, never run on merge request or push events, and run only when $UPDATE_COMPONENTS == "true". Include numerous metric and deployment jobs—deployment-metrics (allow_failure, needs track-deployment, runs `bundle exec rake "metrics:deployment_metrics[$DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT, $DEPLOY_VERSION]"` when $TRACK_DEPLOYMENT == "true" && $DEPLOY_VERSION), join/leave release managers (resource_group release_managers, run `bundle exec rake release_managers:join` or `leave` when $JOIN_RELEASE_MANAGERS/$LEAVE_RELEASE_MANAGERS), environment lock/state metrics, monthly and patch release metrics, record-deployment-blockers (schedule‑only, runs three rake commands), record_metadata_deployment, refresh-delivery-slo-apdex-graph (artifacts deployment-slo-apdex.png, runs `apk add bash curl` then `scripts/fetch-deployment-slo-apdex.sh` on specific changes or schedules), release-managers (cache pull, schedule‑only, retry 2, runs SSH setup then `bundle exec rake release_managers:sync`), release:backport:processor, security:git:sync_tags, security:merge-train, track-deployment (timeout 1h30m), and validate-security-merge-requests, each executing the specified `bundle exec rake` commands and respecting their individual rules, only/except, resource groups, retries, and timeouts.
